name: Custom Kinematic Chain Construction
description: A robotics engineer is prototyping a custom 3-DOF planar articulated manipulator. Programmatically construct this mechanism in an empty CoppeliaSim scene using the ZMQ Remote API, consisting of a base, three revolute joints for planar motion, and three links with lengths of 0.3m, 0.25m, and 0.15m in a base-to-tip hierarchy. Validate the model by performing a forward kinematics sweep of at least 25 configurations over a 120° range. Export the simulated end-effector positions and calculated position errors (fk_error_mm) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/kinematic_sweep.csv and the model specifications to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/kinematic_model.json. Keep CoppeliaSim open when finished. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
